title: agonandra obtusifolia subsp. obtusifolia
intro: Agonandra obtusifolia subsp. obtusifolia, also known as the 'Tropical Dog Tooth' or 'Tropical Dog Tooth Vine', is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Agonandra obtusifolia subsp. obtusifolia include its potential use in treating various ailments such as fever, respiratory infections, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its roots and bark are also used in traditional medicine.
